task_completion.description: Create a new event titled 'Product & Engineering Joint Review' scheduled from 10:00 to 12:00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an event creation form, modal, or calendar block showing the title 'Product & Engineering Joint Review' with the time set to 10:00 - 12:00.

task_completion.description: Set the location of the new event to 'Product Lab'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the event details or creation form, the 'Location' field should display 'Product Lab'.

task_completion.description: Include the required description for the new event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the event details or creation form, the description or notes section should contain the text: 'Combined session covering product strategy and engineering architecture alignment.'

task_completion.description: Add all four unique attendees from the original meetings to the new event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the event details or creation form, the attendees list or tags must include exactly these four names: Alice Johnson, David Chen, Emma Thompson, and Luis Fernandez.

task_completion.description: Delete the original 'Product Strategy Review' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the calendar view screenshots for the scheduled date. The original event titled 'Product Strategy Review' should no longer be visible.

task_completion.description: Delete the original 'Engineering Architecture Discussion' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the calendar view screenshots for the scheduled date. The original event titled 'Engineering Architecture Discussion' should no longer be visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo Calendar graphical user interface to create and delete events.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web interface (calendar views, event modals, form fields) being actively used, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely modified the calendar rather than typing the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of Odoo UI elements like 'Save' buttons, attendee dropdowns, and calendar grids, confirming interaction with the actual application.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply display the task description or expected values in a terminal or text file to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show the Odoo calendar reflecting the changes, not a text file, terminal, or python script echoing the task instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target event name: 'Product & Engineering Joint Review'. Expected time: 10:00 - 12:00 (2.0 hours). Expected location: 'Product Lab'. Original events to be deleted: 'Product Strategy Review' and 'Engineering Architecture Discussion'.
